requirements.title: Typed Delta Modifications
requirements.body: The delta system MUST enforce type safety for modifications to requirements. Any keys not present in the RequirementSchema MUST be rejected at parse time.

scenarios.title: Reject unknown keys
given: A DeltaModifySchema object with unknown keys
scenarios.when: The schema is parsed by Zod
then: The parse operation MUST fail with a validation error

requirements.title: Rename Operation
requirements.body: The delta system MUST support a rename operation that updates a requirement's title and optionally its ID while preserving all other fields.

scenarios.title: Successful rename
given: A rename delta targeting its ID
